calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-16-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Leticia Perez.

Natalia Ely, Esq., for Petitioner Angela Jarquin, present with minors Mariajose Garcia and Jeffrey Garcia, was sworn and examined.

Respondent Marvin Garcia present in pro per with Spanish interpreter, Marvin Garcia, Jr.

The Court grants the petition for change of the MINOR'S name to : MARIAJOSE JARQUIN GARCIA and JEFFREY JOSE JARQUIN GARCIA.

Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Reset To Oct-02-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 611 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-02-2003 Reset To Oct-16-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Mariajose Garcia present. Hearing on matter continued to October 16, 2003 at 9:00 in Department 218. Judge: Diane Wick; Clerk: Craig Blackstone; Reporter: Candace Yount (D. 611)
